com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class ScanletAttributes

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanletAttributes
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable

    public class ScanletAttributes
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable
    Attributes to determine behavior after submitting scan job. An instance of this class is created using ScanletAttributes.Builder
    It can be used to configure displaying Settings UI page after submitting a job. If ScannerService.submit(Context, ScanAttributes, ScanletAttributes) is called with ScanletAttributes instance created by the following code, built-in Settings UI page will be shown. This page lets user select each job parameter from the list of supported values. 
     ScanletAttributes jobAttributes = new ScanletAttributes.Builder().setShowSettingsUi(true).build();
    Since:
    API 1

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  ScanletAttributes.Builder
      Builder for creating an instance of ScanletAttributes.
